'''Burrk''' was an [[Human/Legends|human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] former [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtrooper]] who deserted the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] after the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]]. He teamed up with two [[Cathar/Legends|Cathar]] siblings, [[Nodon]] and [[Nonak]], and hunted [[Wampa/Legends|Wampas]] on [[Hoth/Legends|Hoth]] even though it was illegal.

==Biography==
[[Drom Guldi]] booked himself on a trip to Hoth to hunt with Burrk, but while they were on the hunt, they were ambushed by Wampas. One Wampa accidentally hit the self-destruct on their ship, and Burrk and his team were left stranded on Hoth.

Eventually [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] and [[Callista Ming]] discovered Burrk and the others on Hoth, and were once again ambushed by Wampas. Burrk and the others took shelter in the ruins of [[Echo Base/Legends|Echo Base]], but Burrk was killed during the fight.

==Appearances==
*[[Darksaber (novel)|''Darksaber'']] {{1st}}
